choices: keeps the run phase open while work continues
items.explain: Raise increments the hold count so run stays alive.

items.prompt: When the total objection count reaches 0…
choices: the run phase can end (then check/report)
items.explain: Zero objections → run can finish → check/report follow.

items.prompt: If two components each raised once…
choices: both must drop before total hits 0
items.explain: Each raise adds to the total; each holder must drop.

items.prompt: Forgetting to drop_objection after a raise can hang the sim in run phase.
items.explain: Stuck count > 0 prevents run from ending.
